title: When you have nausea and vomiting
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Nausea and vomiting home care focuses on hydration, small amounts of fluid, and gradual return to food as tolerated.
Patients should seek care for inability to keep fluids down, dehydration signs, severe abdominal pain, fever, bloody vomit or stool, or prolonged symptoms.
Medication instructions should follow the clinician's prescribed plan.
The source supports supportive-care counseling, not ED diagnostic clearance.
